description_long: This is a robust, single-bladed axe featuring a large, angular metallic head with a pronounced, pointed tip extending forward. The blade is thick and geometric, with a flat upper surface and a sharp, elongated edge, giving it a modern, almost stylized appearance. The handle is long, cylindrical, and appears to be made of metal, with a textured, reddish-brown grip section near the base for improved handling. Both the top and bottom of the handle are capped with gold-colored, rounded fittings, adding a decorative and possibly reinforcing element. The overall design is utilitarian yet visually striking, suitable for heavy-duty tasks or as a display piece. The materials and construction suggest durability and strength, making it appropriate for use in urban maintenance or emergency scenarios.
description: A modern, angular axe with a thick metallic blade, pointed tip, and a long metal handle featuring gold and red accents. The design is robust and visually striking, suitable for heavy-duty urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the handle and the broad, pointed blade extending to the right.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the sharp, narrow edge of the blade and the symmetrical alignment of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blade's thickness and the pointed tip extending to the left.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the blade and the rounded pommel at the base of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Long, straight cylindrical handle, likely metal with a reddish-brown textured grip and gold-colored rounded end caps.
attribute_blade_design: Large, thick, angular single blade with a pointed tip and flat upper surface; no beard or poll, geometric and stylized.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern, likely integrated or securely fitted with decorative end caps.
